description: Risk policy for AI worker scheduling and merge gates. Defines high-risk categories that require extra review or block automated merges.

auth-session.label: Auth / Session
auth-session.notes: Changes to authentication, session management, JWT handling, or guards require architect review before merge.

db-schema-migration.label: DB / Schema / Migration
db-schema-migration.notes: Schema changes and migrations affect all downstream services. Requires architect review and passing prisma generate + typecheck.

nodebb-auth-mode.label: NodeBB Auth Mode
nodebb-auth-mode.notes: NodeBB authentication mode changes can break forum integration. Requires architect review.

security-policy.label: Security Policy
security-policy.notes: Middleware, interceptors, exception filters, and CI/policy config affect the entire request pipeline.

production-deployment.label: Production Deployment Defaults
production-deployment.notes: Bootstrap, configuration, and deployment defaults directly affect production behavior.

destructive-data.label: Destructive Data Changes
destructive-data.notes: Migration files that drop columns, tables, or alter data require dry-run validation and architect review.

legacy-cutover.label: Legacy Cutover
legacy-cutover.notes: Legacy compatibility layers and cutover logic require careful sequencing and architect review.

automation-policy.label: Automation Policy
automation-policy.notes: Policy and automation config changes affect all workers. Requires architect review but any worker type may propose changes.

auto-merge.label: Auto-merge
auto-merge.description: PR may be auto-merged after passing all checks.

architect-review.label: Architect Review
architect-review.description: PR requires explicit approval from a reviewer with the architecture-review role before merge.

architect-review-plus-dry-run.label: Architect Review + Dry Run
architect-review-plus-dry-run.description: PR requires architect review AND a dry-run validation of the migration or destructive operation before merge.

any-worker.label: Any Worker
any-worker.description: Any worker type may be dispatched for this category.

foundation-fix-or-higher.label: Foundation Fix or Higher
foundation-fix-or-higher.description: Only foundation-fix, health-repair, or recovery workers may be dispatched. Runtime feature workers are blocked.
